2026-05-26AAFCCanadian Dairy Commission ActReappointment of the Chief Executive Officer of the Canadian Dairy CommissionReappointment of Benoit Basillais of Gatineau, Quebec, as Chief Executive Officer of the Canadian Dairy Commission, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years, effective July 4, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of the Chief Executive Officer of the Canadian Dairy Commission
precis: Reappointment of Benoit Basillais of Gatineau, Quebec, as Chief Executive Officer of the Canadian Dairy Commission, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years, effective July 4, 2026.
